title: Figure 6 in Species-specific PCR primers for identification of the sibling species Chironomus plumosus (Linnaeus, Į758) and Chironomus balatonicus (Devai, Wuelker et Scholl, Į983) (Chironomidae, Diptera)
author: Gunderina, Larissa I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 6. PCR products obtained with mixed DNAs of Chironomus species and primer pairs plu107F/plu363R and bal86F/plu363R. A – primer pair plu107F/plu363R, PCR product MAR2: 2 – 5 – positive control (C+); 6 – 9 – MAR2; 2, 7 – Mix+T DNA; 3, 8 – Mix-T DNA; 5, 6 – C. plumosus; 4, 9 – negative control (C-). 1 – 100 bp marker. B – primer pair bal86F/plu363R, PCR product MAR6: 11 – 14 – positive control (C+); 15 – 18 – MAR6; 11,16 – Mix+T DNA; 12, 17 – Mix-T DNA; 14, 15 – C. balatonicus; 13, 18 – negative control (C-). 1 – 100 bp marker.
steps_raw: Figure 6. PCR products obtained with mixed DNAs of Chironomus species and primer pairs plu107F/plu363R and bal86F/plu363R. B – primer pair bal86F/plu363R, PCR product MAR6: 11 – 14 – positive control (C+); 15 – 18 – MAR6; 11,16 – Mix+T DNA; 12, 17 – Mix-T DNA; 14, 15 – C. balatonicus; 13, 18 – negative control (C-). 1 – 100 bp marker.
